description_long: This is a medium-sized, vintage steam-powered boat with a black and red hull, featuring a prominent yellow smokestack at its center. The deck is surrounded by metal railings and includes a small cabin structure with windows and a door, likely for navigation and crew shelter. The hull shows signs of weathering and rust, giving it an aged, industrial appearance. The boat is supported on a dry dock platform, with visible supports beneath the hull. The bow is pointed and reinforced, while the stern is rounded and equipped with a rudder and propeller assembly. The overall design suggests it was built for utility, possibly as a tugboat or workboat, with robust construction and functional details.
description: A vintage steam-powered boat with a black and red hull, yellow smokestack, and weathered metal railings, resting on a dry dock platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central smokestack, and metal railings along the deck.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the hull, yellow smokestack, and cabin structure amidships.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded stern, rudder, propeller, and the back of the cabin.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with similar features to view 1, showing the hull's curvature and deck details.
